activities.name: Identity Governance
activities.description: Establish an enterprise identity governance program covering all user types.
activities.intent: Ensure identities are managed consistently and authoritatively across the organization.

activities.name: MFA
activities.description: Enforce MFA for all agency users, including remote and privileged users.
activities.intent: Reduce risk of credential-based attacks which remain the leading initial access vector.

activities.name: Identity Risk Scoring
activities.description: Continuously assess and score identity risk based on behavior, credential exposure, and context.
activities.intent: Enable adaptive access decisions driven by real-time identity risk posture.

activities.name: Privileged Access Management
activities.description: Implement PAM solution covering all privileged accounts with JIT access and session recording.
activities.intent: Reduce standing privilege and ensure accountability for high-risk access.

activities.name: Device Visibility
activities.description: Achieve full visibility into all agency-managed and unmanaged devices.
activities.intent: Cannot enforce policy on devices that are unknown to the organization.

activities.name: Device Compliance
activities.description: Define and enforce device compliance policies tied to security baselines.
activities.intent: Only compliant devices should be granted access to agency resources.

activities.name: Device Threat Detection
activities.description: Deploy endpoint detection capabilities on all managed devices.
activities.intent: Identify device-based threats before they pivot to broader network segments.

activities.name: Network Segmentation
activities.description: Implement macro and micro segmentation across the enterprise network.
activities.intent: Limit lateral movement by reducing implicit trust between network zones.

activities.name: Encrypted Communications
activities.description: Encrypt all traffic in transit including internal east-west flows.
activities.intent: Remove the assumption that internal network position implies trust.

activities.name: Network Access Control
activities.description: Implement dynamic, identity-aware network access policies.
activities.intent: Replace static firewall rules with context-driven access decisions.

activities.name: Application Access Management
activities.description: Integrate applications with centralized identity provider for access control.
activities.intent: Enable consistent, policy-driven access control across all application surfaces.

activities.name: Application Security Testing
activities.description: Integrate SAST, DAST, and SCA into CI/CD pipelines.
activities.intent: Identify and remediate application vulnerabilities before they reach production.

activities.name: Workload Protection
activities.description: Implement CWPP/CSPM for cloud workload protection and posture management.
activities.intent: Extend ZT controls to cloud-native workloads and serverless functions.

activities.name: Data Classification
activities.description: Classify all agency data by sensitivity and apply handling requirements.
activities.intent: Data protection controls require knowing what data exists and its risk level.

activities.name: Data Access Controls
activities.description: Enforce least-privilege data access with ABAC or PBAC.
activities.intent: Ensure users access only the minimum data required for their authorized tasks.

activities.name: Data Encryption
activities.description: Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit using FIPS-approved algorithms.
activities.intent: Protect data confidentiality regardless of where data is stored or transmitted.

activities.name: Data Loss Prevention
activities.description: Deploy DLP to monitor and prevent unauthorized data movement.
activities.intent: Detect exfiltration attempts and enforce data handling policies at egress.
